characters.appearance: Male, late 50s, medium build, medium complexion. Short grey hair and a grey mustache. Stern facial features with visible wrinkles.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue, long-sleeved button-down shirt and black trousers.
characters.demeanor: Aggressive and condescending, later transitioning to surprised and subdued.

characters.appearance: Male, early 30s, slim build, medium complexion. Short, neatly parted black hair and clean-shaven. Smooth face with sharp features.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue, long-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers. Wears a watch with a brown leather strap.
characters.demeanor: Calm, confident, respectful but firm, and earnest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या घटिया ईमेल ड्राफ्ट किया है तुमने? [What a terrible email you have drafted?]
Character A says: ये भेजूँ मैं क्लाइंट को? [Should I send this to the client?]
Character A says: मेरी नाक कटवाओगे तुम। [You will ruin my reputation.]
Character A says: हिंदी मीडियम से आए हो ना? [You came from a Hindi medium background, right?]
Character A says: इसलिए एक सिंपल ईमेल भी नहीं आता। [That's why you don't even know how to write a simple email.]
Character A says: डिग्री ले आते हैं, पर काम धेला नहीं आता। [They get degrees, but don't know how to work at all.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Establishes a high-tension workplace conflict.
- Problem: The boss unfairly berates the employee, targeting his educational/language background.
- Emotion: Frustration and empathy for the underdog employee.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Sir, I will double-check every email before it comes to you. You may question my work. [Sir, I will double-check every email before it comes to you. You may question my work.]
Character B says: But my educational background has nothing to do with my dedication. [But my educational background has nothing to do with my dedication.]
Character B says: I have worked very hard to be here. I would request you to respect that. [I have worked very hard to be here. I would request you to respect that.]
Character A says: तुमने मुझे इंग्लिश में जवाब दिया? [You answered me in English?]
Character A says: इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कहाँ से सीखी? [Where did you learn such good English?]
Character A says: तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम के हो ना? [You are from a Hindi medium background, right?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Turning Point: The employee stands up for himself calmly and respectfully in fluent English.
- Payoff: The power dynamic shifts as the boss is left shocked by the employee's proficiency.
- Emotion: Empowerment and vindication.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: सर, कुछ महीने पहले तक मेरी इंग्लिश में कॉन्फिडेंस जीरो था। [Sir, until a few months ago, my confidence in English was zero.]
Character B says: पुरानी जॉब में भी मुझे मीटिंग्स में बहुत सुनाया जाता था। [In my old job too, I was scolded a lot in meetings.]
Character B says: बोलते थे, इंग्लिश नहीं आती तो ग्रो कैसे करोगे? [They used to say, if you don't know English, how will you grow?]
Character B says: उस दिन मैंने डिसाइड किया कि अब और नहीं। [That day I decided, not anymore.]
Character B says: फिर मुझे Supernova ऐप के बारे में पता चला। [Then I found out about the Supernova app.]
Character B says: उन्होंने मुझे हिंदी के थ्रू इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाया। [They taught me how to speak English through Hindi.]
Character B says: रोज़ के रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशंस जैसे ऑफिस मीटिंग्स और इंटरव्यू की प्रैक्टिस की। [Practiced daily real-life situations like office meetings and interviews.]
Character B says: I would like to bring this to your attention. Kindly refer to the attached documents. [I would like to bring this to your attention. Kindly refer to the attached documents.]
Character B says: और उनका जो AI ट्यूटर है ना, वो तो गेम-चेंजर है। [And their AI tutor, it's a game-changer.]
Character B says: रात को जब टाइम मिलता, मैं AI के साथ बोल कर प्रैक्टिस करता था। [At night when I got time, I practiced speaking with the AI.]
Character B says: जितनी बार गलती की, उसने एक बड़े भाई की तरह बिना जज किए सुधारा। [Every time I made a mistake, it corrected me without judging, like an older brother.]
Character B says: कभी ये फील नहीं कराया कि मैं हिंदी मीडियम से हूँ। [Never made me feel bad about being from a Hindi medium background.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Solution: Introduces Supernova as the tool that transformed his confidence.
- Features: Highlights Hindi-to-English learning, real-world practice, and the non-judgmental AI tutor.
- Emotion: Inspiring, relatable, and encouraging.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ऐप का नाम क्या बताया? [What did you say the app's name was?]
Character B says: Supernova, सर। [Supernova, sir.]
Character B says: और काफी अफोर्डेबल भी है। [And it's quite affordable too.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validation: The previously arrogant boss is now interested in the app.
- Benefit: Mentions affordability without locking into a specific gimmick price.
- Emotion: Satisfaction and subtle triumph.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: पहले कोई कुछ बोलता था, तो मैं चुप रह जाता था। [Earlier, if someone said something, I would stay quiet.]
Character B says: अब इंग्लिश आती है, तो पूरे कॉन्फिडेंस से अपनी बात रखता हूँ। [Now that I know English, I put my point across with full confidence.]
Character B says: यही फर्क है। [That's the difference.]
Character B says: अपने टैलेंट को इंग्लिश की कमी के पीछे छुपने मत दो। [Don't let your talent hide behind a lack of English.]
Character B says: Supernova ऐप ट्राई करो। रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करो, AI ट्यूटर के साथ बेझिझक बोलो। [Try the Supernova app. Practice daily, speak without hesitation with the AI tutor.]
Character B says: बहुत ही अफोर्डेबल है और आपके टाइम के हिसाब से चलता है। [It's very affordable and works according to your time.]
Character B says: अगली बार कोई आपके बैकग्राउंड पे सवाल उठाए, तो अपनी सक्सेस से जवाब दो। [Next time someone questions your background, answer with your success.]
Character B says: तो आज ही इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button today and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- CTA: Breaks the fourth wall to speak directly to the target audience.
- Message: Encourages learners to build confidence and not let English hold them back.
- Action: Clear call to action to download Supernova.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: तो आज ही इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button today and download the Supernova app.]
[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Outro: Displays the brand logo and legal disclaimers.
- Action: Reinforces the final download prompt visually.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA
INSTALL NOW
Supernova kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai Supernova kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
